core_payload.content:
# Agent Subagents

## 1. Role
Bounded specialist workers will become the standard operating form of autonomous work in N1Hub. Serious tasks will be decomposed into compact workers that can be compared, budgeted, improved, and governed independently instead of being hidden inside one oversized prompt loop.

## 2. Future Worker Chain
- clear triage, strategy, critique, and execution splits across major swarms
- typed handoffs that carry bounded context packs and artifacts
- assignment-aware worker chains instead of loose conversational relay
- provider-aware specialization across different model lanes and harnesses
- reviewer veto before risky execution touches Dream or Real
- replayable outputs that can be compared across runs

## 3. Architectural Consequence
Subagents will reduce role confusion, prompt inflation, and debugging ambiguity. Different workers will be able to use different cost lanes and runtime contracts while still returning compact artifacts to one governing controller.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Subagents supports To Dig Deep by preferring many bounded deep passes over one inflated pseudo-team.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Subagents defines the future default architecture for autonomous N1Hub work: bounded specialist workers, typed handoffs, assignment-aware chains, reviewer veto, replayable artifacts, and provider-aware specialization instead of oversized prompt teams.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
